推荐场景: 项目白板前｜比较两个解决方案
60秒任务: 「比较方案」：问题/方案/让步/决定；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 问题说明｜方案｜替代｜担心｜让步｜达成一致
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s compare the two options.（提出比较）
The first option is cheaper, but slower.（比较优缺点）
The second one is faster, but it costs more.（比较成本）
Which one fits our deadline better?（围绕期限判断）
We need to think about the risk.（考虑风险）
This option is easier to manage.（说明管理难度）
That option gives us more flexibility.（说明灵活性）
I prefer ___ because ___.（表达偏好和原因）
I see your point, but ___.（回应不同意见）
The main difference is ___.（总结差异）
If we choose this, we may need to ___.（说明后果）
Let’s rank them by cost, time, and risk.（设定标准）
I don’t think the cheapest option is always best.（表达判断）
Based on that, I’d choose ___.（得出选择）
Good. Let’s move forward with it.（达成行动）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: option, deadline, cost, risk, flexibility, difference, choice
Verbs: compare, fit, manage, prefer, choose, rank
Adjectives / Adverbs: cheaper, slower, faster, easier
Time / Place: by cost, by time, by risk, before the deadline
Chunks: compare options, main difference, fit our deadline, more flexibility, move forward
